violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in condenser fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, black residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The floor and wall junctures behind the mop sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
